summary: Initial test suite generated for SriGoRack Technologies e-commerce site. All 20 backend API tests pass. All 40 frontend E2E tests pass across 5 spec files covering navigation, gallery, pricing, about, contact, admin panel, and golden-path user flows.

issues: Gallery image data-testid on Designs page uses 'design-item-N' not 'gallery-image-N' (correctly documented in tests)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create temporary TEST_* prefixed contacts and gallery images, cleaned up after each test. Admin golden-path creates a TEST_Golden_* gallery image.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Data-testids are fully in place. Key note: gallery images on DesignsPage use 'design-item-N' testids while HomePage gallery uses 'gallery-image-N'. Lightbox uses 'lightbox-overlay' and 'lightbox-close'. Admin tabs: 'tab-all', 'tab-cad', 'tab-rendering'. Admin page: 'admin-login-page' before auth, 'admin-dashboard' after auth.
